methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.has_view_permission
documentation:
Return if the given report, user pair has the view permission
Args:
    report: A Report object
    user: A User object

Returns:
    True if the user has the permission to view the report
Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If inheriting subclass does not explicitly defined this method

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.has_change_permission
documentation:
Return if the given report, user pair has the change permission
Args:
    report: A Report object
    user: A User object

Returns:
    True if the user has the permission to change the report
Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If inheriting subclass does not explicitly defined this method

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.has_delete_permission
documentation:
Return if the given report, user pair has the delete permission
Args:
    report: A Report object
    user: A User object

Returns:
    True if the user has the permission to delete the report
Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If inheriting subclass does not explicitly define this method

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.get_next_parameters
documentation:
Return the temporal next set of parameters (e.g. next month)
Args:
    parameters: The current parameters set

Returns:
    The next parameter set
Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If inheriting subclass does not explicitly define this method

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.get_version_title
documentation:
Derivate the version title based on its report's title and the given parameters set

e.g. report_january_2021

Args:
    report_title: The report title
    parameters: Current paramaters set

Returns:
    The version title. Default to the report title

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.get_version_date
documentation:
Extract the version date based on the current parameters set
Args:
    parameters: Current parameters set

Returns:
    The version date. Default to the value from the key "end" or None.

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.get_context
documentation:
Generate context as a dictionary for the passed object

Args:
    version: The object where context needs to be generated against

Returns:
    Dictionary of key,value pairs

Raise:
    NotImplementedError: If inheriting subclass does not explicitly define this method

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.generate_html
documentation:
Generate a html given a predetermined context dictionary

Args:
    context: The dictionary context

Returns:
    A rendered template as string

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.generate_file
documentation:
Generate a file given a predetermined context dictionary
Args:
    context: The dictionary context

Returns:
    The generated bytes stream

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If inheriting subclass does not explicitly define this method

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.parse_parameters
documentation:
Parse the json parameters into a python dictionary (e.g. str to date)

Args:
    parameters: parameters as json

Returns:
    A python dictionary

methods.name: wbreport.mixins.ReportMixin.deserialize_context
documentation:
Method called before rendering the template. Defaults return the passed dictionary untouched.

e.g. Can return the file url

Args:
    context: The context as pickled dictionry

Returns:
    The deserialized context

methods.name: wbreport.models.ReportClass.__init__
documentation: Set the imported method from the attached module as class attributes.

This class utilises the import module framework, which import the class ReportClass in the specified
class_path.

This class is necessary for a report to implement custom behaviors.

documentation: property containing the primary version (must be unique)

documentation: property containing the latest version (must be unique)

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.earliest_version
documentation: property containing the latest version (must be unique)

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.is_accessible
documentation:
Check if this report is accessible by anybody or the given user

Args:
    user: If None, check for global permission. Otherwise, check if the given user can access the report

Returns:
    True if report is accessible

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.get_permissions_for_user
documentation:
Return a generator of allowed (view|change|delete) permission and its editable state

Get the default permissions from PermissionObjectMixin and extend it based on the attached report class

Args:
    user: The user to which we get permission for the given object
    created: The permission creation date. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    A dictionary of string permission identifier, editable state key value pairs.

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.get_or_create_version
documentation:
Return the version corresponding to the specified parameters. Update its context if necessary
Args:
    parameters: The parameters to filter against
    update_context: If True, update the returned version context
    comment: Optional comment

Returns:
    The found or created version

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.set_primary_versions
documentation:
Set the version corresponding to these parameters as primary (will automatically unset the previous primary

Args:
    parameters: The parameters to filter against

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.get_context
documentation:
Get the base (default) context from the report.

Args:
    **kwargs: keyword argument context

Returns:
    A dictionary containing the default report context

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.get_gradient
documentation:
Get the colors gradients based on the report base color

Returns:
    The gradient list of colors

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.get_next_parameters
documentation:
Get the next parameters if they are not explicitly defined and if report has previous versions.
Args:
    next_parameters: explicit next parameters.

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.generate_next_reports
documentation:
Generate and update context of all descendant versions whose report inherits from this parent report.
Do not generate and update context for non-active reports.

Args:
    next_parameters: The parameters used to create versions. If None, the current report parameters is used.
    comment: Optional report comment
    max_depth_only: Boolean that allows to generate next reports for leaves node.
Parent Report function

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.bulk_create_child_reports
documentation:
Bootstrap utility function to generate multiple iterations of versions
Args:
    start_parameters: The seed dictionary parameters to spinup the process
    end_parameters: The end parameters where the loop stops
    max_iteration: Max number of allowed iteration before exiting. Defaults to 20.

methods.name: wbreport.models.Report.set_primary_report_version
documentation:
Set all similar active children (all descendants including self) reports's versions as primary
Args:
    parameters: Set all corresponding versions as primary. If None, use the report current parameters

A class that represent the Report instance.

Inherit PermissionObjectModelMixin to enable user object based permission

methods.name: wbreport.models.ReportVersion.save
documentation: Override save method to ensure uniqueness of primary among report's version

methods.name: wbreport.models.ReportVersion.get_context
documentation:
Get the base context and the ReportClass module get_context for the version.

Args:
    **kwargs: Divers keyword arguments to be injected in the get_context function

Returns:
    A dictionary containing the dynamic and base version context

methods.name: wbreport.models.ReportVersion.update_context
documentation:
Update version context. If an error is encounter, we disabled automatically this version

Args:
    **kwargs: Divers keyword arguments to be injected in the get_context function

methods.name: wbreport.models.ReportVersion.generate_file
documentation:
Generate the file file (BytesIO object) given the context by calling the method generate_file in ReportClass

Returns:
    The BytesIO object containing the generated file

methods.name: wbreport.models.ReportVersion.generate_html
documentation:
Generate the html given the context by calling the method generate_html in ReportClass

Returns:
    The generated html as string

methods.name: wbreport.models.ReportVersion.send_mail
documentation:
Send the version as a file in a email to the mailing list specified in the parent report.

Args:
    template: The template to use as mail body. Defaults to None (and the default module template)
    base_message: The base mail message. Defaults to None
